div.class: o_grid_item o_grid_item_image g-height-8 g-col-lg-5 col-lg-5 text-center order-lg-0 rounded-4
o_grid_item o_cc o_cc2 g-height-4 g-col-lg-3 col-lg-3 justify-content-end order-lg-0 rounded-4
o_grid_item o_cc o_cc3 g-height-4 g-col-lg-4 col-lg-4 justify-content-end order-lg-0 rounded-4
div.style: order: 1; --grid-item-padding-y: 20px; --grid-item-padding-x: 20px; z-index: 3; grid-area: 1 / 9 / 5 / 13; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--o-color-4) -400%, var(--o-color-2) 100%);

div.class: o_grid_item o_cc o_cc4 g-height-4 g-col-lg-4 col-lg-4 justify-content-end order-lg-0 rounded-4
div.style: order: 3; --grid-item-padding-y: 20px; --grid-item-padding-x: 20px; z-index: 4; grid-area: 5 / 6 / 9 / 10; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--o-color-4) -400%, var(--o-color-1) 100%);

div.class: o_grid_item o_cc o_cc2 g-height-4 g-col-lg-3 col-lg-3 justify-content-end order-lg-0 rounded-4
